description_long: This is a square-based, deep red glass bottle with a glossy finish, featuring a short neck and a wide, flat body. The bottle is topped with a beige, paper-wrapped cap secured by a string, and a rectangular tag hangs from the neck, displaying some printed text and a small decorative motif. The front and sides of the bottle are adorned with a subtle, dark ornamental design near the base, adding a touch of elegance. The glass surface is highly reflective, giving the bottle a polished, premium appearance. The overall form is compact and sturdy, suggesting it is designed to hold liquids securely. No visible signs of damage or wear are present, and the bottle appears to be empty or its contents are not visible.
description: A glossy, deep red square glass bottle with a beige paper-wrapped cap and decorative tag, featuring dark ornamental designs near the base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the square body, glossy red surface, and dark ornamental design; the cap and tag are visible but the tag's text is not readable.
description_view_1: This view highlights the tag hanging from the neck, with visible printed text and motif, and the ornamental design on the bottle's body.
description_view_2: Side view similar to the front, showing the square profile, glossy finish, and ornamental design, with the tag edge visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displays the square body and ornamental design, with the cap and tag string visible but no text readable.
attribute_label_or_branding: A beige rectangular tag with printed text and a small decorative motif hangs from the neck; dark ornamental design is present near the base on all sides.
